why_this_action.summary: Converted the selected Apollo lane into a real external asset by creating a live Apollo people list for current curator outreach follow-up, reusing the existing outreach queue and outbound contacts instead of generating another packet.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
curator_outreach_queue_latest.json: current live curator targets already exist and need follow-through
marketing_2026-05-22_*curator_email.json: existing sent curator contacts are reusable outbound follow-up records
apollo_status.json: Apollo login is healthy and available for execution

evidence: Apollo UI showed list 'Ralph Workflow — curator follow-up 2026-05-22' created successfully.
The list was created from a CSV built from active curator outreach contacts already used in live outreach.
notes: Apollo immediately showed the new list in the Lists view.
The visible record count was 0 right after creation, so the import path likely needs a second-pass check before using this list for a sequence.
